description: Style NoteImpossibly stylish candy pop ballet flats from carlton london. Colour block a monochrome ensemble or brighten up sugary pastels with this pair. A happy colour-burst, this shoe is great for DIY projects (staple some metallic sequins on it or paste a few studs)Product Details Pink ballet flats with slip on stylingSoft footbedTPU outsole with a short textured heelMaterial and CareLeatherWipe with a clean cloth to remove dust, grime or dirtDo not store in direct sunlight
